stages.representation: canonical LLVM declarations for all four packed-FP8 conversions
stages.detail: Pinned LLVM canonicalized the four i16(float, float) declarations to nocallback, nofree, nosync, nounwind, speculatable, willreturn, and memory(none) in 1,724-byte IR (SHA-256 d6a1f164920582f756e24a01e4ac1ccd87042b45fb7202bcabfc27dad23e095a).

stages.representation: typed LLVM intrinsic calls in PTX high, low source order
stages.detail: Pinned LLVM lowered the 1,128-byte fixture (SHA-256 c34fcffc96185a5a3d746fb99435955858780171b842b88b1939e94469ca0fe7) to 977-byte PTX (SHA-256 8da714495549c455c6a77d168e5d193463037164645fa90f8cc505dccbc1adb1) containing all four exact conversions. PTX 8.0 and sm_87 were rejected.

stages.representation: typed LLVM output assembled at the exact floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas produced a 3,368-byte cubin (SHA-256 8758c825ff05674628381bbf19cfe4ba99f5077971ce6066e863c292fb42b82a) retaining E4M3/E5M2 base and ReLU forms.

stages.representation: pure inline PTX with u16 output and public low, high inputs
stages.detail: Pinned LLVM lowered the 1,022-byte inline fixture (SHA-256 5919ef9b476cd61b2e276cd2726e6db9cf443ac6dced739366284450a50087fa) to 1,305-byte PTX (SHA-256 ac6134577dc1f9083d0373e5883bd028f2b7d2cd27891c600598725eb10c1701). Every form used the reviewed $0, $2, $1 order and =h,f,f constraints.

stages.representation: inline PTX assembled at the exact floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas produced a 3,368-byte cubin (SHA-256 f238c85c61f29667b999a4bc0fadcbfafa85b980558687e1b6ba6e1f3217482d). PTX 8.0 and sm_87 failed with the expected floor diagnostics.
